title: epidendrum glumarum
intro: Epidendrum glumarum, also known as the Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum glumarum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparation of Epidendrum glumarum is typically done through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
